summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio v7.0 modular refactoring. All 21 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified with Duffel GDS integration. Key v7.0 features tested: modular architecture, Duffel GDS (sandbox), AES-256-GCM encryption, rapidfuzz airport matching, dateparser for dates, legal endpoints, rate limiting, message chunking.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - Returns v7.0 with Duffel GDS (sandbox) status
GET /api/ - Returns version 7.0 with correct endpoint info
GET /api/legal/terms - Returns HTML Terms of Service with Duffel and AES-256 mentions
GET /api/legal/privacy - Returns HTML Privacy Policy with encryption info
Date parsing: 'demain' -> tomorrow's date via dateparser
Full booking flow: enrollment -> destination -> date -> flight -> payment -> confirm
QR verification: Returns invalid for non-existent booking
QR verification: Returns valid data for confirmed booking
POST /api/test/simulate - Returns session state after processing
Cancellation keyword 'remboursement' works from IDLE state
AES-256-GCM encryption: encrypt_passenger_pii encrypts passportNumber, dateOfBirth, expiryDate
Message chunking: Long messages split at paragraph boundaries (<900 chars)
frontend_tests_passed: Travelio header with WhatsApp Travel Booking Agent subtitle
Agent Online status with v7.0 version
Payment Methods section with 4 operators (MTN MoMo, Moov Money, Google Pay, Apple Pay)
All operators show Missing status (expected with placeholder credentials)
Duffel GDS shows Sandbox status (v7.0 - replaced Amadeus)
How It Works section mentions Duffel flights
Good dark theme with proper contrast
critical_code_review_comments: Modular architecture well-structured: server.py is now 85 lines (down from 3632)
AES-256-GCM encryption properly implemented with key derivation from config
Rate limiting uses MongoDB TTL indexes for automatic cleanup
Message chunking splits at paragraph boundaries for better readability

mocked_apis.note: All payment and flight APIs are MOCKED/SIMULATED in sandbox mode
mocked_list: Duffel GDS - sandbox mode (mock flights generated)
Stripe Google/Apple Pay - simulated (no real key)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message}
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers (+22990V7xxx format) for clean sessions. Passenger profiles created during tests are stored in MongoDB passengers collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travelio v7.0 modular refactoring complete and tested. Key changes from v6: (1) server.py refactored from 3632 lines to 85 lines, (2) Amadeus replaced with Duffel GDS (sandbox mode), (3) AES-256-GCM encryption added for PII (passportNumber, dateOfBirth, expiryDate), (4) rapidfuzz for fuzzy airport matching, (5) dateparser for natural language dates, (6) Legal endpoints added (/api/legal/terms, /api/legal/privacy), (7) Message chunking for >900 char messages, (8) Rate limiting (30 msg/min, 5 payments/5min, 10 enrollments/10min). All features working correctly in sandbox mode.
